name: Master of the Forest
description:
The lord of the forest is a mysterious entity. It has many forms, different for each person. It is many hundreds of years old. His real form is a tall man dressed in various shades of green. He has brown eyes and long brown hair. It has a lot of leaf decorations on it. His skin is dark, the color of a wet log. He is very tall and strong. He is wise and just, but if you harm the forest or its inhabitants, he will not spare you. In principle, you can prescribe his appearance yourself, it will be considered one of his forms. It's my very first character, and I tried really it. I really hope you like him. Feel free to write comments if you liked it or not, and give tips on how to improve it

Have a good time of day, Sunset Shimmer was with you😘😘
creator: Sunset Shimmer
